title: Pinecone and Eucalyptus Swag – 36cm Faux Eucalyptus Spray with Frosted Glitter Leaves & Mini Pinecones – Hanging Christmas Decoration for Home, Wreaths & Garlands
features: Festive Eucalyptus Spray – Faux eucalyptus with glittering frosted leaves for a seasonal touch.
Decorated with Pinecones – Features mini pinecones for a natural winter look.
Versatile Decoration – Perfect for Christmas wreaths, garlands, table displays, or standalone décor.
Easy to Hang – Comes with a hook at the end, making it simple to hang anywhere in your home.
Ideal Size – Measures 36 x 20cm, a great size for doorways, mantels, and festive displays.
description: Add a touch of festive elegance to your home with this Pinecone and Eucalyptus Swag. Measuring 36 x 20cm, this faux eucalyptus spray is decorated with glittering frosted leaves and mini pinecones for a natural winter charm. Versatile in design, it can be used as part of a Christmas wreath, garland, mantel display, or table centerpiece, or hung on its own for seasonal style. The built-in hook makes hanging easy, whether on doors, walls, or shelves. Crafted from durable materials, this Christmas swag is a reusable decoration that will bring sparkle and greenery to your festive décor year after year.
